title: tsaphah #6822
definition:
1) to look out or about, spy, keep watch, observe, watch
    1a) (Qal) to keep watch, spy
    1b) (Piel) to watch, watch closely
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal) to keep watch, spy
    1b) (Piel) to watch, watch closely

    NASB:  to look out or about, spy, keep watch
